tasks.name: Start a 14-day trial of the cheapest plan with meal plans priced between $15–$25/month
tasks.description: Use the pricing section on the fitness app landing page to find all plans priced between $15 and $25 per month, choose the cheapest one that includes 'Meal Plans' in its feature list, and complete the 14-day trial sign-up form with the specified details.
steps: Navigate to the landing page homepage.
Click the "Pricing" option in the top navigation bar.
Scroll down to the pricing section where multiple subscription plan cards with monthly prices and feature lists are displayed.
Identify the cheapest plan whose displayed monthly price is between $15 and $25 and whose feature list includes the text "Meal Plans".
Click the "Start 14-Day Free Trial" button on the selected plan card.
In the trial sign-up form, click into the "Full Name" field and type "Alex Trial".
Click into the "Email" field and type "alex.trial@example.com".
Open the "Primary fitness goal" dropdown and select the option labeled "Lose weight".
Click the main "Start Free Trial" or "Continue" button at the bottom of the form to submit the trial request.

tasks.name: Save a beginner, no-equipment home workout plan with at least 3 weekly sessions
tasks.description: From the workouts section of the landing page, filter for beginner-level, no-equipment home workout plans, select a plan that offers at least 3 sessions per week, and save it to your personal list using the available save/add button.
steps: From the homepage, click the "Workouts" link in the top navigation bar.
In the workouts section, click the filter labeled "Level" and select the checkbox or option for "Beginner".
Click the filter labeled "Equipment" and select the option "No equipment".
Click the filter labeled "Location" or "Type" and choose the option that indicates "Home" workouts.
Click the filter labeled "Sessions per week" (or similar) and select the options "3 sessions" and "4+ sessions" so that only plans with at least 3 sessions per week are included.
Click the "Apply filters" button to update the list of workout plans.
From the filtered results, locate the first plan card whose subtitle or details show "3 sessions/week" or more and click on that plan card to open its details page.
On the workout plan details page, locate and click the button labeled "Save", "Add to My Plan", or "Try this plan".
If a small confirmation or preferences form appears, leave any optional fields as their defaults and click the main button to finish saving the plan.

tasks.name: Create a 3-day weekly schedule with strength, cardio, and yoga sessions under 45 minutes
tasks.description: Use the weekly planner widget on the landing page to select the week labeled "Mon 4 – Sun 10" and schedule three workouts: a strength session on Monday, a cardio session on Wednesday, and a yoga session on Friday, each with a duration of 45 minutes or less.
steps: Navigate to the landing page homepage.
Scroll down until you reach the section labeled "Weekly Workout Planner" or similar.
In the planner's week dropdown or selector, choose the week labeled "Mon 4 – Sun 10".
In the column for Monday ("Mon"), click the "Add workout" or "+" button.
In the workout selection panel that opens, select a workout categorized as "Strength" with a displayed duration of 45 minutes or less, then click the button to add it to Monday.
In the column for Wednesday ("Wed"), click the "Add workout" or "+" button.
In the workout selection panel, select a workout categorized as "Cardio" with a displayed duration of 45 minutes or less, then click the button to add it to Wednesday.
In the column for Friday ("Fri"), click the "Add workout" or "+" button.
In the workout selection panel, select a workout categorized as "Yoga" with a displayed duration of 45 minutes or less, then click the button to add it to Friday.

tasks.name: Calculate a weight-loss calorie target and submit it via the 'Email me this plan' form
tasks.description: Use the calorie calculator on the landing page to compute daily calories for a 30-year-old female (65 kg, 170 cm, moderately active, goal: lose 0.5 kg/week), then submit the result using the "Email me this plan" form with the specified email address.
steps: From the homepage, scroll down to the section labeled "Calorie & Macro Calculator" or similar.
In the "Age" input field, click and type "30".
In the "Weight" input field, click and type "65".
In the "Height" input field, click and type "170".
In the "Gender" selector, choose the option labeled "Female".
Open the "Activity level" dropdown and select "Moderately active".
Open the "Goal" dropdown and choose the option labeled "Lose 0.5 kg per week".
Click the "Calculate" button to generate the daily calorie target.
Below the result, in the form labeled "Email me this plan", click the "Email" field, type "cal.plan@example.com", and then click the "Send me my plan" button to submit the form.

tasks.name: Select an annual plan under $40/month with the most 1:1 coaching sessions
tasks.description: On the pricing section, switch to annual billing, find all plans with an effective monthly cost of $40 or less, determine which of these offers the highest number of 1:1 coaching sessions per month, and proceed with that plan to the next checkout/sign-up step.
steps: Navigate to the landing page homepage and click the "Pricing" link in the top navigation bar.
In the pricing section, locate the billing toggle and switch it from "Monthly" to "Annual".
Identify all plan cards whose displayed equivalent monthly price under annual billing is less than or equal to $40.
Among those plans, determine which one lists the highest number of "1:1 coaching sessions per month" in its feature list and select that plan as your choice.
Click anywhere on the chosen plan card or its "Learn more" link to open the detailed plan view or modal.
In the detailed view, click the button labeled "Continue with this plan", "Choose plan", or similar.
On the next page or modal (e.g., checkout or sign-up), scroll to the bottom and click the primary "Continue" or "Proceed" button to move forward with that annual plan.

tasks.name: Book an evening live class for tomorrow under 45 minutes with rating 4.5+
tasks.description: Use the live classes section to select tomorrow's date, filter for classes starting between 6:00 PM and 10:00 PM with a duration of 45 minutes or less and a rating of at least 4.5 stars, then book the first matching class and complete the simple booking form.
steps: From the homepage, click the "Live Classes" link in the main navigation or in a prominent hero section button.
At the top of the live classes page, open the date selector and choose tomorrow's date.
Open the "Start time" filter and select the range "6:00 PM – 10:00 PM".
Open the "Duration" filter and select the option labeled "45 minutes or less".
Open the "Rating" filter and choose the option labeled "4.5+ stars".
Click the "Apply filters" button to update the list of available classes.
From the filtered list, click the first class card that appears.
On the selected class detail page, click the button labeled "Book spot", "Reserve seat", or similar.
In the booking form, click the "Name" field, type "Sam Evening", and then click the "Confirm booking" or equivalent button to finalize the reservation.

tasks.name: Subscribe to training tips emails 3 times per week focused on strength and mobility
tasks.description: Use the newsletter section on the landing page to subscribe with a specific email and name, select strength and mobility as focus areas, set email frequency to 3 times per week, and restrict notifications to training tips and workout reminders only.
steps: On the homepage, scroll down to the section titled "Stay motivated", "Newsletter", or similar that contains an email sign-up form.
Click the "Email address" input field and type "strength.mobility@example.com".
Click the "First name" input field and type "Jordan".
In the "What do you want to focus on?" area, click to select the options labeled "Strength" and "Mobility/Flexibility".
Open the "Email frequency" dropdown and select the option labeled "3 times per week".

In the notification preferences or topics list, click to select "Training tips & workout reminders" and click to deselect any other categories such as "Promotions" or "Product updates" if they are currently selected.
Click the primary "Sign me up", "Subscribe", or equivalent button to submit the newsletter preferences.

tasks.name: Ask via chat if membership can be paused for 2 weeks without losing progress
tasks.description: Use the FAQ section on the landing page to search for information about pausing membership, then open the support chat widget from that area and send a specific question about pausing membership for 2 weeks while keeping progress data.
steps: On the homepage, click the "FAQ" link in the top navigation bar or scroll down to the FAQ section.
In the FAQ search box, click and type "pause membership".
From the search results or FAQ list, click the question whose title includes the phrase "pause membership" to expand its answer.
Near the FAQ section, click the button or link labeled "Still need help?", "Chat with us", or similar to open the chat widget.
In the chat widget that appears (usually at the bottom corner of the screen), click inside the message input field.
Type the message "Can I pause my membership for 2 weeks starting next Monday without losing my progress data?" into the chat input field.
Click the "Send" icon or press the chat widget's "Send" button to submit your question.
